allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*headless*'\\'' -or $_.MainWindowTitle -eq '\\'''\\'' } | Select-Object Id,@{n='\\''headless'\\'';e={$_.CommandLine -like '\\''*headless*'\\''}} | Format-Table -Auto; \(Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''chrome.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''headless|--user-data-dir=.*\(Temp|puppeteer\)'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='\\''cl'\\'';e={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(90,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -Auto -Wrap')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''node.exe'\\''" | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='\\''cl'\\'';e={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(100,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -Auto -Wrap; '\\''--- chrome count ---'\\''; \(Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count')
